news.t: ESG on the edge: Controversy weighs on sustainable ETFs
They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think
7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
S&P Dow Jones Indices Wins ESG Investing's Best ESG Index Provider Award
ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom
Sustainable investment funds just surpassed $1 trillion for the first time on record
Watch out for this trend in ESG investments, Wharton's Jeremy Siegel warns

holdings.infoBox: USSG is an equity ETF with a total of 271 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.23%, Microsoft at 8.18%, Alphabet at 6.24%, Alphabet at 4.93%, and Tesla at 3.36%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI USA Selection Equity ETF (USSG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA ESG Leaders index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-cap stocks, screened for environmental, social, and governance characteristics. USSG was launched on Mar 7, 2019 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: ETF Edge: ESG ETFs face backlash
data.text: Arne Noack, DWS Group, joins CNBC's Bob Pisani to discuss the backlash ETFs that focus on ESG investing are facing.

data.title: ESG on the edge: Controversy weighs on sustainable ETFs
data.text: Investing in ESGs has taken a controversial turn in recent weeks as some states have taken aim at the sustainable funds.

data.title: They may be attracting big money, but these ETFs may not be as eco-friendly as you think
data.text: Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) ETFs lack clarity, so investors don't always know where their money is going, S&P Global's Mona Naqvi warns.

data.text: Morningstar's Jon Hale, MSCI's Linda-Eling Lee and Main Management's Kim Arthur discuss how the past year has impacted ESG ETFs. With CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom
data.text: The number of sustainability-focused index funds, and investor assets in these funds, have doubled over the last three years, according to Morningstar, and Covid-19 added to interest.
